tasks.label: UNIT TESTS (fast, no GPU, no download)
INTEGRATION: all (downloads SDK + builds bundle + WARP/ANGLE)
tasks.command: cargo test --features engine-tests --lib -- --nocapture --test-threads=1 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath logs.txt | Write-Host

tasks.label: INTEGRATION: resize test only
tasks.command: cargo test --features engine-tests --lib satellite_texture_converges -- --nocapture --test-threads=1 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath logs.txt | Write-Host

tasks.label: STRESS: multi-view stress tests (engine)
tasks.command: cargo test --features engine-tests --lib software_renderer::multiview::tests::stress -- --nocapture --test-threads=1 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath logs.txt | Write-Host

tasks.label: INTEGRATION: ResizeBuffers hook test
tasks.command: cargo test --features engine-tests --lib satellite_resize_uses_resize_buffers -- --nocapture --test-threads=1 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath logs.txt | Write-Host

tasks.label: INTEGRATION: resize flicker race
tasks.command: cargo test --features engine-tests --lib texture_size_does_not_outrun -- --nocapture --test-threads=1 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath logs.txt | Write-Host

tasks.label: INTEGRATION: shared texture cross-device sync (mutex vs no-mutex)
tasks.command: cargo test --features engine-tests --lib shared_texture_race -- --nocapture --test-threads=1 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath logs.txt | Write-Host

tasks.label: INTEGRATION: maximize from Dart (isolated, own engine)
tasks.command: cargo test --features engine-tests --lib maximizing_satellite_from_dart -- --nocapture --test-threads=1 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath logs.txt | Write-Host

tasks.label: INTEGRATION: all (RELEASE/AOT Flutter build)
tasks.command: $env:FLUTTER_TEST_RELEASE='1'; cargo test --features engine-tests --lib -- --nocapture --test-threads=1 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath logs.txt | Write-Host

tasks.label: CLIPPY (lib + tests, engine-tests feature)
tasks.command: cargo clippy --lib --tests --features engine-tests 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath logs.txt | Write-Host
